title: phlegmariurus rufescens
intro: Phlegmariurus rufescens, also known as the red club moss, is a type of evergreen plant species belonging to the lycopodiopsida class. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus rufescens include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and skin conditions.
